scripts.setup:
# Copy Rails encrypted credentials keys from the main repo (gitignored, not in worktree)
MAIN_REPO="$(dirname "$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir)")"
mkdir -p config/credentials
for key in development.key staging.key production.key test.key; do
  if [ -f "$MAIN_REPO/config/credentials/$key" ]; then
    cp "$MAIN_REPO/config/credentials/$key" "config/credentials/$key"
    echo "Copied config/credentials/$key from $MAIN_REPO"
  fi
done

# bundle, create db, migrate, run seeds
bin/setup

# install frontend deps
npm install
scripts.run:
# Kill whatever is running on port 3000
lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9
bin/dev
scripts.archive:
# Frontend deps
rm -rf node_modules

# Vite build output
rm -rf public/vite public/vite-ssr public/vite-dev

# Rails tmp + logs
rm -rf tmp/cache tmp/pids tmp/sockets tmp/storage
rm -f log/*.log
